{{Quote|They've lost control of the drill. It's destabilizing the surface of the planet!|[[Dellis Tantor]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Force Commander">''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''</ref>}}
The '''Sarapin drilling platform''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] facility on [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]]. Perched on a framework over the crater of a volcano, the laser drill operated normally until its capture by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], the Rebels lost control of the drill, leading to severe tectonic disturbances that destroyed an [[energy collector]]. If not shut down, the drill threatened to trigger volcanic eruptions and [[Groundquake/Legends|groundquakes]] that could ravage the surface of the planet. Fortunately, [[Brenn Tantor]] and his forces had arrived to retake the Sarapin facilities from the Alliance. Tantor recaptured the drill and inserted his technically-minded brother [[Dellis Tantor|Dellis]] into the facility, where he was able to input the shutdown codes and save Sarapin and its energy-production capacity.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' {{1st}}
